'''bawate''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adverbs|adverb]] meaning "[[Wikt:logically|logically]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| b-w-th
|-
! Word class
| [[Adverb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:logically|logically]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| bawate
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].[[present]] || [[word:bawate|bawate]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]] || [[word:bawatesher|bawatesher]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:bawatesherĂ«m|bawatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:bawatero|bawatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:bawateshĂ«|bawateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:bawateshĂ«m|bawateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokibawatero|gokibawatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokibawateshĂ«|gokibawateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokibawateshĂ«m|gokibawateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gobawankerom|gobawankerom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gobawankeshĂ«|gobawankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gobawankeshĂ«m|gobawankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gobawankeya|gobawankeya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:bawaterom|bawaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:bawatemu|bawatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:bawateya|bawateya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokibawaterom|gokibawaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokibawatemu|gokibawatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokibawateya|gokibawateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[present]] || [[word:bawawate|bawawate]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:bawawatesher|bawawatesher]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:bawawatesherĂ«m|bawawatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:bawawatero|bawawatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:bawawateshĂ«|bawawateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:bawawateshĂ«m|bawawateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokibawawatero|gokibawawatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokibawawateshĂ«|gokibawawateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokibawawateshĂ«m|gokibawawateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gobawawankerom|gobawawankerom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gobawawankeshĂ«|gobawawankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gobawawankeshĂ«m|gobawawankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gobawawankeya|gobawawankeya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:bawawaterom|bawawaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:bawawatemu|bawawatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:bawawateya|bawawateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokibawawaterom|gokibawawaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokibawawatemu|gokibawawatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokibawawateya|gokibawawateya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[present]] || [[word:bĂŠwĂŠte|bĂŠwĂŠte]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:bĂŠwĂŠtesher|bĂŠwĂŠtesher]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:bĂŠwĂŠtesherĂ«m|bĂŠwĂŠtesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:bĂŠwĂŠtero|bĂŠwĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:bĂŠwĂŠteshĂ«|bĂŠwĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:bĂŠwĂŠteshĂ«m|bĂŠwĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokibĂŠwĂŠtero|gokibĂŠwĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokibĂŠwĂŠteshĂ«|gokibĂŠwĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokibĂŠwĂŠteshĂ«m|gokibĂŠwĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gobĂŠwĂŠnkerom|gobĂŠwĂŠnkerom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gobĂŠwĂŠnkeshĂ«|gobĂŠwĂŠnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gobĂŠwĂŠnkeshĂ«m|gobĂŠwĂŠnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gobĂŠwĂŠnkeya|gobĂŠwĂŠnkeya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:bĂŠwĂŠterom|bĂŠwĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:bĂŠwĂŠtemu|bĂŠwĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:bĂŠwĂŠteya|bĂŠwĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokibĂŠwĂŠterom|gokibĂŠwĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokibĂŠwĂŠtemu|gokibĂŠwĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokibĂŠwĂŠteya|gokibĂŠwĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[present]] || [[word:bafwafte|bafwafte]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:bafwaftesher|bafwaftesher]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:bafwaftesherĂ«m|bafwaftesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:bafwaftero|bafwaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:bafwafteshĂ«|bafwafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:bafwafteshĂ«m|bafwafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokibafwaftero|gokibafwaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokibafwafteshĂ«|gokibafwafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokibafwafteshĂ«m|gokibafwafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gobafwafnkerom|gobafwafnkerom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gobafwafnkeshĂ«|gobafwafnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gobafwafnkeshĂ«m|gobafwafnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gobafwafnkeya|gobafwafnkeya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:bafwafterom|bafwafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:bafwaftemu|bafwaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:bafwafteya|bafwafteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokibafwafterom|gokibafwafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokibafwaftemu|gokibafwaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokibafwafteya|gokibafwafteya]]
|}

''76 forms generated.''

== See also ==
